MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-20-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER/NOTICE OF RULING FILED FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, LORENZO DONATI AND DYANA LECHUGA'S MOTION TO STRIKE PLTFS' STATE LAW CAUSES OF ACTION PURSUANT TO CCCP 425.16 - DEFENDANTS' SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE PLAINTIFF'S STATE LAW CAUSES OF ACTION PURSUANT TO CCP 425.16 IS GRANTED AS TO ALL CAUSES OF ACTION. ALL CAUSES OF ACTION ARISE FROM PROTECTED ACTIVITY UNDER THE ANTI-SLAPP STATUTE. PLAINTIFF CONCEDES THE CITY SHOULD NOT BE A DEFENDANT AND THAT ITS RATIFICATION CLAIM WILL NOT SUCCEED. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO SHOW A PROBABILITY OF PREVAILING ON THE CAUSES OF ACTION FOR INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS, DEFAMATION AND RATIFICATION BECAUSE THE CAUSES OF ACTION ARE BARRED BY THE LITIGATION PRIVILEGE. SEE CIVIL CODE 47(B). PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO SHOW A PROBABILITY OF PREVAILING ON THE THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION FOR MALICIOUS PROSECUTION BECAUSE IT IS BARRED BY GOVERNMENTAL IMMUNITY UNDER GOV. CODE 821.6. IN THE ALTERNATIVE, EVEN IF DEFENDANTS WERE NOT IMMUNE, PLAINTIFF FAILS TO SHOW A PROBABILITY OF SUCCESS ON THE MERITS, SINCE PLAINTIFF CANNOT ESTABLISH THAT DEFENDANT LACKED PROBABLE CAUSE. DEFENDANTS' REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT--MADE IN THE OPPOSITION TO THIS MOTION--IS DENIED. PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 425.16(C ), THE COURT AWARDS REASONABLE ATTORNEYS FEES TO DEFENDANTS IN THE AMOUNT OF $15,000. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE $375 PER HOUR RATE IS REASONABLE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 =302/MJM

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-30-2013 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-26-2013 Set For Order To Show Cause On Nov-19-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Pltfs' State Law Causes Of Action Pursuant To Cccp 425.16
Off Calendar Sep-20-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - MICHAEL B. NISHIYAMA OF THE FROST LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. (510) 792-5310 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. WARREN METLITZKY, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, TEL. NO. 554-3916 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, LORENZO DONATI AND DYANA LECHUGA'S Motion To Strike Pltfs' State Law Causes Of Action Pursuant To Cccp 425.16 - Defendants' Special Motion to Strike Plaintiff's State Law Causes of Action Pursuant to CCP 425.16 is granted as to all causes of action. All causes of action arise from protected activity under the anti-SLAPP statute. Plaintiff concedes the City should not be a defendant and that its ratification claim will not succeed. Plaintiff has failed to show a probability of prevailing on the causes of action for intentional infliction of emotional distress, defamation and ratification because the causes of action are barred by the litigation privilege. See Civil Code 47(b). Plaintiff has failed to show a probability of prevailing on the third cause of action for malicious prosecution because it is barred by governmental immunity under Gov. Code 821.6. In the alternative, even if Defendants were not immune, Plaintiff fails to show a probability of success on the merits, since Plaintiff cannot establish that Defendant lacked probable cause. Defendants' Request for Judicial Notice is granted. Plaintiff's request to amend the complaint--made in the opposition to this motion--is denied. Pursuant to CCP Section 425.16(c ), the Court awards reasonable attorneys fees to Defendants in the amount of $15,000. The Court finds that the $375 per hour rate is reasonable. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =302/mjm
